description: A dropdown menu with trigger, keyboard navigation, and click-outside to close.

align.description: Alignment of the dropdown content relative to the trigger

trigger.description: The element that opens the dropdown. Must be focusable.

handled: aria-haspopup="menu" is set on the trigger
aria-expanded is toggled on the trigger
aria-controls links the trigger to the content panel
role="menu" is set on the content panel
role="menuitem" is set on each dropdown item
Arrow keys move focus between items; Home/End jump to first/last
Escape closes and restores focus to the trigger

required.requirement: Provide aria-label on the trigger (e.g. aria-label="Open menu").

counterExamples.reason: Missing slot="trigger". The dropdown has nothing to open it.
Children should be aihio-dropdown-item/separator so keyboard navigation and menuitem roles work. Wrap links in aihio-dropdown-item.

related.description: A selectable item in the dropdown

select.description: Fired when the item is selected

related.description: A visual separator between dropdown items
